text.title: Fixed Vs Hourly Decision Framework Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the fixed-vs-hourly decision record. Validator enforces signal scoring, kill-criteria, named decider, reversal trigger.

example.code: { "decision_id": "fvh-acme-onboarding-rebuild", "engagement": {"client": "Acme", "scope_summary": "Rebuild onboarding flow over 6 weeks; deliver A/B framework + 3 variants."}, "signals": {"scope_clarity": "high", "change_rate": "low", "client_maturity": "high", "domain_familiarity": "high"}, "options_considered": ["fixed", "hourly", "hybrid"], "chosen": "fixed", "kill_criteria": {"fixed": "If change requests >3/week in weeks 1-2, reopen as hybrid", "hourly": "n/a (rejected)", "hybrid": "n/a (rejected)"}, "reversal_trigger": "Change-request rate exceeding 3/week sustained for 2 weeks", "decider": "@ruslan", "decided_at": "2026-05-23", "reassessment_at_25pct": "2026-06-04" }

example.note: decider="team"; missing signals + kill_criteria + reversal_trigger + dates.

list.item: kill_criteria missing for the chosen option (rule kill-criteria-numeric).
Any signal not in {low, medium, high} (rule signal-scored).
